title: ekbole #1546
definition:
1) a casting out
 2) the throwing overboard of goods and lading whereby sailors
    lighten a ship in a storm to keep her from sinking
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) a casting out
 2) the throwing overboard of goods and lading whereby sailors
    lighten a ship in a storm to keep her from sinking

    NASB:  a throwing out, i.e. spec. a throwing overboard (of the cargo):
